TABLE.NAME: local_yucardphoto
TABLE.COMMENT: YU Card photo references — stores filesystem path/url for each student photo imported from the YU Card system.

FIELD.NAME: sisid
FIELD.COMMENT: Student Information System ID (e.g. York student number)

FIELD.NAME: moodle_file_url
FIELD.COMMENT: Moodle pluginfile URL to the stored photo (set after file is written to the Moodle file system)

FIELD.NAME: yucard_image_path
FIELD.COMMENT: Relative path within the Moodle file area (component/filearea/itemid/filepath/filename)

FIELD.NAME: yucard_lastupdated
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp of the last time the photo was updated in the source YU Card system

TABLE.NAME: local_yucardphoto_coursesettings
TABLE.COMMENT: Per-course settings for the YU Card photo roster feature.

FIELD.NAME: enabled
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 = Photo View button shown on participants page, 0 = hidden
